Risk Title: Access restriction issues in CVS Retail Production Support
Risk Desc:
Access restriction issues in CVS Retail Production Support across towers to achieve L1 synergy.
We are planning to implement L1 synergy across Supply Chain/Patient Safety and Store Operations. But we observe access restrictions from CVS Customer which blocks our L1 Synergy and Optimization Plan.
Mitigation Plan: Plan to highlight the importance of L1  Synergy across all towers to CVS, along with its benefits and enable access  for L1 teams between Supply Chain/Patient Safety & Store Ops.
Contingency Plan: Long term plan is to implement L1 Synergy across all the towers
Mitigation Status: operate as common team and enable 24*7 coverage

Risk Title: Optimized Production Support team demands high risk on delivery & Issues on Shift Coverage
Risk Desc: Reduced team size may lead to high risk on delivery & Shift Coverage gaps. CVS Retail Production Support has majorly 4 towers. 1) Rx Growth 2) Front store 3) Supply Chain & Patient Safety 4) Store Operations We are planning for Optimized Production support effective September 01,2024 in order to synchronous with our proposed staffing plan and it demands high risk on delivery and shift coverage issues considering any ad-hoc leaves/national holidays
Mitigation Plan: Bring In synergy between all 4 towers for L1 team, and automate manual activities as much as possible to reduce the day to day effort.

Risk Title: Additional resources to be equally added across all towers to ensure 24*7 support without any delivery issues
CVS Retail Prod support - Challenges observed on Automation Use cases
Risk Desc: CVS Retail Prod support - Use cases were analyzed and identified to eliminate manual effort. Recommended possible solutions with latest technology and observed challenges on implementation. CVS SME`s suggested that development team will work on identified automation use cases phase by phase. This leads to delay in implementation of use cases considering development team priroities.
Mitigation Plan: Reiteration of Automation benefits to CVS SME and increase precedence of use cases/user stories in upcoming sprints. Regular follow-up with development team on tentative ETA.
Contingency Plan: Continuous discussion is in progress with CVS to ensure that Automation use cases are implemented on priroity

Risk Title: CVS Feedback across towers and its action items
Risk Desc: Requested feedback questionaries with CVS SME`s and received feedback across all towers. It demands process standardization on key activities.
Mitigation Plan: Analyzed the CVS Feedback in detail and created action items to optimize and standardize operational support.
Contingency Plan: Discussed with CVS SME`s and both Offshore & Onshore leads on CVS feedback along with its action items. Planned to have periodical check to ensure that action items are tracked for closure.

Risk Title: AIPO - Implementaion Process
Risk Desc:
Context : AIPO - Delays observed in Implementation process                                                                                         Condition : Comphrensive & Complex process in CVS network
Consequence : Delay and Comphrensive process lead to additional timelines in AIPO Implementation
Mitigation Plan: Planning to avoid the comphrensive process by discussing the stakeholders on the steps in detail.
Contingency Plan: Clear Execution Plan on each phase will help us to overcome the risk highlighted.

Risk Title: Approval of the drafted Statement of Work (SOW) is still in progress.
Risk Desc:
Context: The drafted Statement of Work (SOW) for the project has been prepared and submitted for review.

Condition: The SOW is still pending formal approval, leaving key elements such as project scope, responsibilities, deliverables, timelines, and cost undefined.

Consequence: This may lead to delays in project initiation, misalignment of stakeholder expectations, resource allocation conflicts, and potential cost overruns or contractual disputes.
Mitigation Plan: Coordinating with the stakeholders for approval
Contingency Plan: Communicating revised timelines and risks to client and internal stakeholders to manage expectations.

Risk Title: Resource Attrition
Risk Desc: Losing any team member and not finding the right resource on time in the project can lead to the risk of reduced billing.
Mitigation Plan:
1. Monitor for attrition risk and address with appropriate retention tactics.
2. Keep the resource motivate and align with project goals
Contingency Plan: i) Connect with TAT team and find the right replacement

Risk Title: ii) Key team members can be replacing with appropriate lead time.
Quality Deliverables.
Risk Desc: With new team developers joining the team, there is risk of achieving baselined quality & Velocity of the project.
Mitigation Plan:
1. Internal Peer Review with the senior developer.
2. Customer tech review for the high critical code changes.
Contingency Plan: 1) Perform RCA and drive the corrective actions.

Risk Title: 2) Track the Corrective actions until the baselined metrics is achieved.
Team Unitization
Risk Desc: Poor Backlog health. During some period, there can be low work in the project, which will lead to a risk of low team unitization.
Mitigation Plan:
1. Follow up with Product Owner and get the Pipeline of tickets.
2. Send Weekly Status Report with Risk on time.
3. Keep all the internal stakeholders informed.
4. Bring up Utilization issue in MBR.

Risk Title: Ii) Make sure no issues for the billing.
Iii) Engage the team in learning new skills or Improving customer ECO system.
